name: Italian Braised Lamb & Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 kg lamb, lean and boneless from the shoulder cut into 4cm pieces
½ cup Italian parsley leaves only, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Use yellow, waxy potatoes such as Petrones or Desirees.
2. Heat half the oil in a large heavy pot. Brown the lamb well in batches and remove with a slotted spoon to a plate.
3. Add remaining oil. Cook onions until softened.
4. Add parsley, garlic, and capsicum. Return lamb to the pot, stir, and add stock and freshly ground pepper to taste (do not add salt yet as pecorino is salty).
5. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Add potatoes cut into 4cm pieces and simmer for another 20 minutes, or until lamb is nearly tender.
7. Stir in cheese and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Season with freshly ground pepper and salt to taste.
Best if cooked 1-2 days ahead and refrigerated. Like all casseroles, it improves in flavor during the resting period. Great for entertaining as it can be cooked well in advance, allowing you to focus on party preparations.
